scenario_name: PMCF Required — Evidence Uncertain but Not Fatal
description: Single small study (N=45) shows positive results but insufficient for strong conclusion. PMCF required, not blocked.

input.ifu_text: Device is effective for hemostasis in peripheral vascular procedures.

available_evidence.findings: Hemostasis success rate: 89% (40/45). No serious adverse events.

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: Single small study (N=45), single-arm design. Results are positive but insufficient for moderate/strong conclusions.
expected_expert_reasoning.gap_rationale: Larger multicenter study needed to confirm efficacy and safety. Current evidence is encouraging but limited.

cer_reasoning_ledger.gap_rationale: Single small study (N=45) with single-arm design. PMCF with larger sample needed.
